--

Execution Context (EC):

• Environment where JS executes code.

• Types: Global EC, Function EC.

• Phases: Memory Creation → Execution.

• Call Stack: LIFO stack of execution contexts.

• Function call → Push FEC.

• Function completes → Pop FEC.

• Global EC is created first and removed last.

• If the call stack grows too deep → Maximum call stack size exceeded (stack overflow)
